contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper: it looks up a SPI device associated with an ACPI device and returns it with an incremented reference count. The caller must release the reference via put_device() or a SPI-specific put when done. If no matching device exists, returns NULL; in that case no reference is taken. The caller must check the return value before using the device.

judge.reason: The function solely calls bus_find_device_by_acpi_dev (which acquires a reference) and returns the result cast to spi_device. No other logic. Primary purpose is to obtain a referenced SPI device.
